utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , I will be back in just a minute . Oh , Phoebe I am sorry that I left lipstick marks on the phone .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: You did not leave lipstick marks on the phone .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , then it must have been you . Bye .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Bye ... bye ! That is why I moved out .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Hey , you know while we are on that , when are you gonna tell my sister that you do not live here anymore .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I think on some levels she already knows .
